action: Cycle 3 (predicate quality) — Auditor predicate-quality-review section + acs-verdict.json schema extension
operator_note: Layer 3 of the four-layer predicate-quality defense (after Cycle 1 author separation + Cycle 2 linter/mutation-preflight). Scope: (1) MODIFY agents/evolve-auditor.md — add new 'Predicate quality review' section. Auditor reads each predicate file, classifies (behavioral / grep-only / mixed); raises a CRITICAL defect for each un-waived grep-only predicate; surfaces HIGH warning for each 'mixed' predicate (some grep, some subprocess). (2) MODIFY acs-verdict.json schema — add predicate_quality block: { per_predicate: [{ path, classification, has_subprocess_invocation, diff_files_referenced, waived }], summary: { behavioral_count, grep_only_count, mixed_count, blocking_count } }. Linter (from Cycle 2) emits the block; Auditor consumes and gates on it. (3) Ensure jq-inspectable post-cycle: 'jq .predicate_quality .evolve/runs/cycle-N/acs-verdict.json'. GATE: 1-cycle dry run on a contrived task seed where TDD writes a deliberately mixed predicate — Auditor MUST surface it as HIGH, ship MUST proceed (HIGH non-blocking), cycle MUST be flagged for retrospective. Predecessor: Cycle 2 (linter writes the predicate_quality block; Auditor consumes). Plan: see evidence_pointer.
